Model: sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2
Source: https://huggingface.co/sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2
License: Apache-2.0

This repository includes a vendored, quantized ONNX export of the
`sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2` model and the tokenizer files.

The model and tokenizer are redistributed here under the terms of the
Apache License, Version 2.0. The full text of the Apache-2.0 license is
included in APACHE-2.0.txt in this folder.

Attribution:
- Original author: sentence-transformers (https://huggingface.co/sentence-transformers)
- Model page: https://huggingface.co/sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2

Notes:
- If you redistribute or publish this repository, preserve this file and the
  APACHE-2.0.txt license text alongside the vendored model files.
